content:
# Total Organic Carbon

**Summary**: A measure of the total amount of carbon found in organic compounds in water.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] measured TOC to assess the concentration of organic matter.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] TOC provides a more comprehensive measure of organic content than COD alone.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] measured using an Analytikjena multi N/C analyzer.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Initial TOC was 251 mg/L. ([[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023, p. 39]])
